'''''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 2''' is the second issue of the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series ''[[Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand]]''. It was written by [[Timothy Zahn]] and [[Michael A. Stackpole]], illustrated by [[Carlos Ezquerra]], and published on [[September 2]], [[1998]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Under cover of an Imperial raid, Mara Jade infiltrates the headquarters of would-be Black Nebula overlord Dequc, and assassinates the criminal leader. But back on Imperial Center, she finds evidence that the person she shot was a stand-in, and that the real Dequc is still out there, and gunning for her!''
